optional_accent_budget.ceiling_interpretation: Class-level maxima are ceilings, not instructions to maximize every optional accent class simultaneously.

tracking_notes: TROUBLESHOOTING, CITED_EVIDENCE, and EXTERNAL_STORY are tracked outside the optional-accent bucket.
AUTHOR_DISCLOSURE is distinct from AUTHOR_COMMENTARY even when no authored disclosure bank is present.
ANALOGY, METAPHOR, and callback return surfaces are counted downstream from slots/hooks and audits, not from optional accent budgets.
